mapper.select:
SELECT sp.id, sp.subject_id, sp.question, sp.answer, sp.explanation, sp.difficulty, sp.option1, sp.option2, sp.option3, sp.option4, sp.option5 FROM subjective_problems sp LEFT JOIN subject s ON s.id = sp.subject_id WHERE 1=1
AND LOWER(s.name) = LOWER(#{categoryName})
ORDER BY sp.created_at DESC

SELECT sp.id, sp.subject_id, sp.question, sp.answer, sp.explanation, sp.difficulty, sp.option1, sp.option2, sp.option3, sp.option4, sp.option5 FROM subjective_problems sp LEFT JOIN subject s ON s.id = sp.subject_id WHERE 1=1
AND LOWER(s.name) = LOWER(#{category})
ORDER BY sp.created_at DESC

SELECT sp.id, sp.subject_id, sp.question, sp.answer, sp.explanation, sp.difficulty, sp.option1, sp.option2, sp.option3, sp.option4, sp.option5 FROM subjective_problems sp LEFT JOIN subject s ON s.id = sp.subject_id WHERE sp.id = #{id}
